problem_statement: Write solve(matrix) to rotate a square matrix 90 degrees clockwise in place and return the same matrix object. An empty matrix is valid.
test_source:
from solution import solve

def test_rotation_and_identity():
    matrix = [[1,2],[3,4]]
    assert solve(matrix) is matrix
    assert matrix == [[3,1],[4,2]]

def test_empty():
    assert solve([]) == []
